description: §52.15.5 (S255) Leak 3 regression — a `${@currentUser.id}` buried in a `-- line comment` is INERT at the DB (the live query is `SELECT * FROM posts`, unscoped). Before the SQL-comment strip, the raw-text scan counted the commented interpolation as row-scope by BOTH the omission and the lint → the auth-scoped unscoped cell was KEPT in the anon SSR seed, silently. Now `stripSqlComments` runs before the interpolation scan, so the cell is treated as the unscoped query it executes as → omitted from the anon first-paint + `window.__scrml_ssr_state` seed, and the I-SSR-AUTH-SCOPED-CLIENT-HYDRATED info lint fires on @posts. A sibling PUBLIC `@widgets` (auth=none) is NOT over-omitted.
rationale: §52.15.5: `queryInterpolationsAreServerAmbientOnly` scans the COMMENT-STRIPPED query — a DB ignores comments at execution, so a `${@currentUser}` inside `--`/`/* */` must not count as row-scope. The commented row-scope filter is treated as the unscoped query it executes as → omitted from the anon seed → client-hydrated behind the gated /__serverLoad fetch.
